name: Bishohori
overview: When a series of mysterious deaths casts a dark shadow on a family's centuries-old Nagpanchami festival, the new bride must confront a divine curse allegedly behind it all. In a gripping battle between tradition and truth, she uncovers secrets that challenge the family’s faith and her beliefs.

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Bishohori (বিষহরি) | Solanki, Rohaan | Srijit Roy, Souvik C | 14 Feb | hoichoi
